IDirect3DDevice8::BlockUntilIdle

Block until the graphics hardware is no longer busy.

VOID BlockUntilIdle();

Parameters

None.

Return Values

None.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in D3d8.h.
  Import Library: Use D3d8.lib.

See Also

IDirect3DDevice8::IsBusy
